brand_identity.name: Travo
brand_identity.mission: To make travel booking in India feel like a seamless, beautiful adventure.
brand_identity.target_audience: Gen Z & Millennial Indian travelers, Property Owners
brand_identity.design_archetype: The Modern Explorer (Swiss Layouts + Organic Warmth)

headings.usage: All major section headings (h1, h2, h3). Use 'tracking-tight' for a premium feel.

mono.usage: Code snippets, booking reference numbers, technical data.

primary.description: Vibrant Saffron - The core brand color. Use for primary CTAs and key highlights.

secondary.description: Deep Slate - Use for secondary buttons and dark mode backgrounds.

accent.description: Emerald Green - Use for success states, 'Available' tags, and eco-friendly badges.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all

cards.property: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: p-8 rounded-2xl bg-background border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero.description: Happy Indian couple/friends traveling - Hero Section
Couple in front of monument - Hero Alternate

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
THEME SETUP: Implement the color palette in tailwind.config.js. Use CSS variables for dynamic theme switching.
ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'phosphor-icons' if you need more specific travel icons.
MAPS: Use 'react-map-gl' or 'google-map-react' for the map integration. Ensure the map is interactive.
CURRENCY: ALL prices must be displayed in Indian Rupees (₹). Use 'Intl.NumberFormat' for proper formatting (e.g., ₹12,000).
FORMS: Use 'react-hook-form' + 'zod' for the 'List Your Property' flow. It must be robust.
ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and card hover effects. Keep it smooth, not jerky.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards. Use semantic HTML.
DO NOT use generic 'lorem ipsum'. Use realistic travel content (e.g., 'Luxury Villa in Goa', 'Cozy Homestay in Manali').
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, gradients).
Create depth with layered shadows and z-index.
Use glassmorphism for sticky headers and overlays.
Micro-animations are mandatory for all interactions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
NEVER use AI emojis (🤖, 🚀) as icons.
